title: venpm Lockfile
description: Lockfile tracking installed plugins for venpm, the Vencord Plugin Manager

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for IDE validation

installed.description: Map of plugin name to installed plugin entry

version.description: Installed version (semver or 'local' for local installs)

repo.description: Repository name this plugin was installed from

pinned.description: Whether this plugin is pinned to its current version

installed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the plugin was installed

git_ref.description: Git ref (commit SHA, tag, or branch) used for installation

path.description: Subdirectory path within the git repo (for monorepos)
